examples.en: She keeps her jewelry in a locked box.
This shop sells handmade jewelry.
He gave her a pearl necklace.
The necklace matches her dress.
examples.zh: 這條項鍊很配她的洋裝。

examples.en: She wears a silver bracelet.
The bracelet jingled on her wrist.
examples.zh: 手鍊在她手腕上叮噹作響。

examples.en: He put a ring on her finger.
examples.zh: 他把戒指戴到她手指上。

examples.en: Her ring has a big diamond.
examples.zh: 她的戒指有一顆大鑽石。

examples.en: She lost one gold earring.
These earrings are too heavy.
A small heart pendant hung from the chain.
examples.zh: 鍊子上掛著一個小小的心形墜子。

examples.en: She bought a jade pendant as a gift.
examples.zh: 她買了一個玉墜當禮物。

examples.en: Grandma pinned a brooch on her coat.
examples.zh: 奶奶在外套上別了一枚胸針。

examples.en: The flower brooch sparkled in the light.
examples.zh: 那枚花形胸針在燈光下閃閃發亮。

examples.en: She wore a thin anklet on the beach.
examples.zh: 她在海灘上戴著一條細腳鍊。

examples.en: The anklet has tiny bells.
He wears a thick gold chain.
The chain broke and the pendant fell.
examples.zh: 鍊子斷了,墜子掉了下來。

examples.en: She added a new charm to her bracelet.
examples.zh: 她在手鍊上加了一個新飾物。

examples.en: Each charm tells a story.
examples.zh: 每個小飾物都有一個故事。

examples.en: The crown is covered with gems.
He collects rare gems.
This ring holds a blue gemstone.
examples.zh: 這枚戒指鑲著一顆藍寶石。

examples.en: They polished the rough gemstone.
examples.zh: 他們把粗糙的原石磨亮。

examples.en: A diamond is very hard.
Her ring sparkles with a real diamond.
examples.zh: 她的戒指鑲著真鑽,閃閃發光。

examples.en: Pearls come from oysters.
She wore a string of white pearls.
The ruby glowed deep red.
examples.zh: 這顆紅寶石泛著深紅色光澤。

examples.en: A ruby sits at the center of the ring.
examples.zh: 戒指中央鑲著一顆紅寶石。

examples.en: The green emerald caught everyone's eye.
examples.zh: 那顆綠寶石吸引了眾人目光。

examples.en: She prefers emeralds to diamonds.
examples.zh: 她喜歡綠寶石勝過鑽石。

examples.en: The sapphire was a deep ocean blue.
examples.zh: 這顆藍寶石是深海般的藍。

examples.en: He chose a sapphire for the ring.
examples.zh: 他為戒指挑了一顆藍寶石。

examples.en: Many people in Taiwan wear jade for luck.
examples.zh: 很多台灣人戴玉求平安。

examples.en: This jade bangle was her mother's.
The lamp is made of clear crystal.
examples.zh: 這盞燈是用透明水晶做的。

examples.en: She hung a crystal in the window.
examples.zh: 她在窗邊掛了一顆水晶。

examples.en: The ring is made of pure gold.
examples.zh: 這枚戒指是純金打造的。

examples.en: Gold does not rust.
She likes silver more than gold.
The silver spoon turned dark.
Platinum is more expensive than gold.
Their wedding rings are platinum.
This clasp is made of metal.
Gold and silver are precious metals.
The bag is made of real leather.
He bought a brown leather belt.
The necklace is made of wooden beads.
examples.zh: 這條項鍊是用木珠串成的。

examples.en: She strung the beads onto a thread.
The clasp on the necklace is broken.
She fastened the clasp behind her neck.
examples.zh: 她在脖子後面扣上搭扣。

examples.en: My watch stopped last night.
He checked his watch and left.
He wears an old wristwatch every day.
examples.zh: 他每天都戴著一支舊手錶。

examples.en: The wristwatch has a leather band.
The clock on the wall is slow.
An old clock stood in the hall.
examples.zh: 大廳裡擺著一座老時鐘。

examples.en: The watch has a black dial.
examples.zh: 這支錶的錶面是黑色的。

examples.en: Numbers glow on the dial at night.
examples.zh: 錶面上的數字在夜裡發光。

examples.en: The watch strap is too tight.
She changed the strap to blue.
The watch band broke this morning.
She wore a thin gold band as a ring.
examples.zh: 她戴著一枚細金環當戒指。

examples.en: She carries a small handbag.
His mother wants a new handbag.
examples.zh: 他媽媽想要一個新手提包。

examples.en: She took her keys out of her purse.
My purse is full of coins.
He lost his wallet on the bus.
examples.zh: 他在公車上弄丟了皮夾。

examples.en: Her wallet holds many cards.
Students carry heavy backpacks.
examples.zh: 學生們背著沉重的後背包。

examples.en: He put his laptop in his backpack.
She uses a canvas tote for shopping.
examples.zh: 她用帆布托特包買東西。

examples.en: The tote can hold a lot of books.
examples.zh: 這個托特包能裝很多書。

examples.en: She carried a small black clutch to the party.
examples.zh: 她拿著一個小黑手拿包去派對。

examples.en: A clutch has no strap.
She keeps coins in a little pouch.
examples.zh: 她把硬幣放在小袋子裡。

examples.en: The pouch has a drawstring.
He tightened his belt.
The belt has a silver buckle.
The belt buckle is shiny gold.
He couldn't fasten the buckle.
He wears sunglasses on sunny days.
Her sunglasses are very stylish.
He clips a wallet chain to his jeans.
examples.zh: 他把錢包鍊扣在牛仔褲上。

examples.en: The wallet chain keeps it safe.
He wore silver cufflinks to the wedding.
examples.zh: 他戴著銀色袖扣去婚禮。

examples.en: One cufflink is missing.
She bought a cute keychain as a souvenir.
examples.zh: 她買了一個可愛的鑰匙圈當紀念品。

examples.en: My keys hang on a metal keychain.
examples.zh: 我的鑰匙掛在金屬鑰匙圈上。

examples.en: She keeps a photo inside her locket.
examples.zh: 她在小墜盒裡放了一張照片。

examples.en: The locket opens like a tiny book.
examples.zh: 這個墜盒像小書一樣打開。

examples.en: The bride wore a sparkling tiara.
A tiara sat on the little girl's head.
examples.zh: 小女孩頭上戴著一頂小皇冠。

examples.en: She stacked three bangles on her arm.
examples.zh: 她手臂上疊戴了三只手環。

examples.en: The gold bangle slid off her wrist.
examples.zh: 金手環從她手腕上滑落。

examples.en: She tied a silk scarf around her neck.
The scarf keeps him warm.
She fixed her hair with a hairpin.
A pearl hairpin held her bun.
examples.zh: 一支珍珠髮簪固定住她的髮髻。
